name: recording-digest
description: Turn a recording or transcript that lives on disk into a structured summary, entirely locally. Two skills share one local pipeline (audio is transcribed with mlx-whisper, the running Claude does the structuring, no external API): matter-intake produces a seven-section legal client-intake summary, meeting-digest produces a domain-neutral TL;DR / decisions / action-items / open-questions note. Output stays next to the recording by default so confidential content is not auto-synced.
